sharc
Documentation développeur
Configurator.cs
1 using System;
2 using System.Collections.Generic;
3 using System.Linq;
4 using System.Text;
5 using System.Diagnostics;
6 using System.Threading;
7 using System.Xml.Linq;
8 using System.IO;
9 using System.ComponentModel;
10 using System.Text.RegularExpressions;
11 using ArcaneInfra.Common;
12 
13 // TODO Ajouter log() mais avec un dictionnaire int -> string en clef
14 // ou bien un Generic pour indexer avec un enum + dictionnaire enum -> string
15 // TODO ajouter une completion contextuelle pour zsh
16 // TODO interdire le croisement Release / Debug entre la configuration et la compilation Windows
17 // Check if arcane-path of package paths exists before running CMake
18 /* Ajouter une norme d'info
19  -X specify a mandatory option
20  [-X] specify a optional option
21  <X> must be replaced by a numerical or string value.
22  X|Y specify a choice beetween X and Y
23 */
24 
25 
26 namespace ArcaneInfra.Configure
27 {
28  public class Configurator
29  {
30  #region CONFIGURATIONS
31  string codename = "Configurator.exe";
32  string vendor_tag = "vendor";
33  string windows_compile_command = "devenv %p.sln /build %m";
34  string windows_test_command = "ctest -C %m";
35  string linux_compile_command = "make -j 4";
36  string linux_test_command = "ctest";
37  string default_log_format = "%t.log";
38  #endregion
39 
40  #region OPTIONS WITH DEFAULT VALUES
41  bool show_help = false;
42  bool new_build_system = true;
43  bool release_mode = false;
44  bool? static_mode = null;
45  bool mpi_mode = true;
46  bool dry_mode = false;
47  bool sublime_generator = false;
48  bool eclipse_generator = false;
49  bool ninja_generator = false;
50  string opt_arcane = null;
51  string opt_arcane_path = null;
52  string opt_arcgeosim_package_file = null;
53  string opt_base_command = null;
54  string opt_root_path = null;
55  string opt_build_path = null;
56  string opt_install_prefix = null;
57  string opt_vstudio_name = null;
58  string opt_toolset_name = null;
59  string opt_graphviz = null;
60  bool clean_cache = true;
61  string opt_clean = null;
62  string opt_cmake_extra_options = null;
63  List<string> meta_tags = new List<string> ();
64  Dictionary<string,bool> packages = new Dictionary<string,bool> ();
65  string default_fortran_compiler = null;
66  bool do_compile = false;
67  bool do_test = false;
68  string do_log_format = null;
69  #endregion
70 
71  #region MEMBERS
72  private DateTime m_date_time;
73  private string m_project_name;
74  private CommonTools m_common_tools = null;
75  private Mono.Options.OptionSet m_options = null;
76  private string m_current_compile_command;
77  private string m_current_test_command;
78  private string[] external_envs = { "CC", "CFLAFS", "CXX", "CXXFLAGS", "FC", "FFLAGS" };
79  #endregion
80 
81  #region EXCEPTION
82  [Serializable]
83  public class ConfiguratorException : Exception
84  {
85  public ConfiguratorException ()
86  {
87  }
88 
89  public ConfiguratorException (string message)
90  : base(message)
91  {
92  ;
93  }
94  }
95 
96  [Serializable]
97  public class ConfiguratorExit : Exception
98  {
99  public ConfiguratorExit ()
100  {
101  }
102 
103  public ConfiguratorExit (string message)
104  : base(message)
105  {
106  ;
107  }
108  }
109  #endregion
110 
111  #region Logger
112  private class MirroringTextWriter : TextWriter {
113  private TextWriter main, aux;
114 
115  public MirroringTextWriter(TextWriter Main, TextWriter Aux) {
116  main = Main;
117  aux = Aux;
118  }
119  public override Encoding Encoding {
120  get {
121  return main.Encoding;
122  }
123  }
124  public override void Write(char value) {
125  main.Write (value);
126  aux.Write (value);
127  }
128  public override void Write(string value) {
129  main.Write (value);
130  aux.Write (value);
131  }
132  };
133  #endregion
134 
135  #region CONSTRUCTOR
136  public Configurator ()
137  {
138  m_common_tools = new CommonTools ();
139  m_options = new Mono.Options.OptionSet ();
140  m_date_time = DateTime.Now;
141  if (m_common_tools.isWindows ()) { // Windows
142  m_current_compile_command = windows_compile_command;
143  m_current_test_command = windows_test_command;
144  } else { // Linux
145  m_current_compile_command = linux_compile_command;
146  m_current_test_command = linux_test_command;
147  }
148 
149  // Console.WriteLine ("Starting configure at {0}", m_date_time.ToString ("s"));
150 
151  String domain_name = System.Net.NetworkInformation.IPGlobalProperties.GetIPGlobalProperties().DomainName;
152  if (Regex.IsMatch(domain_name, @"^ifp(.fr)?$"))
153  {
154  opt_vstudio_name = "Visual Studio 12 Win64";
155  default_fortran_compiler = "ifort";
156  }
157 
158  setupOptions ();
159  }
160  #endregion
161 
162  #region OPTIONS
163  private void setupOptions ()
164  {
165  m_options.Add ("d|debug", "Debug mode" + ((!release_mode) ? " (default)" : ""),
166  v => { release_mode = false; });
167  m_options.Add ("r|release", "Release mode" + ((release_mode) ? " (default)" : ""),
168  v => { release_mode = true; });
169  m_options.Add ("vendor", "Vendor mode\nThis option will enable vendor meta tag in configuration and checks some restrictions for software diffusion",
170  v => { meta_tags.Add (vendor_tag); });
171 
172  if (m_common_tools.isWindows ()) { // Windows
173  m_options.Add ("visual=", "Visual Studio name " + ((opt_vstudio_name != null)?String.Format("(default is '{0}')", opt_vstudio_name):("required")),
174  (string s) => { opt_vstudio_name = s; });
175  m_options.Add ("toolset=", "Toolset for compiling (default value is provided by Visual Studio)",
176  (string s) => { opt_toolset_name = s; });
177  } else {
178  m_options.Add ("sublime", "Sublime text + Makefile generator ",
179  v => { sublime_generator = true; });
180  m_options.Add ("eclipse", "Eclipse + Makefile generator ",
181  v => { eclipse_generator = true; });
182  m_options.Add ("ninja", "Ninja generator ",
183  v => { ninja_generator = true; });
184  }
185 
186  // TODO
187  // m_options.Add ("option=TYPE", "description", v => { /* ACTION */});
188  // m_options.AddComment("Comment");
189  m_options.Add ("new|new-build-system", "Enable new build system (default)",
190  v => { new_build_system = true; });
191  m_options.Add ("old|old-build-system", "Disable new build system",
192  v => { new_build_system = false; });
193  m_options.Add ("enable-shared", "Shared libraries compilation mode",
194  v => { static_mode = false; });
195  m_options.Add ("enable-static", "Static libraries compilation mode (opposite option of --enable-shared)",
196  v => { static_mode = true; });
197  m_options.Add ("prefix=", "Define install path",
198  (string s) => { opt_install_prefix = normalizePath (s); });
199  m_options.Add ("package=", "Define package absolute path (override ArcGeoSim default)",
200  (string s) => { opt_arcgeosim_package_file = normalizePath (s); });
201  m_options.Add ("arcane=", "Define local arcane version (override ArcGeoSim default)",
202  (string s) => { opt_arcane = s; });
203  m_options.Add ("arcane-path=", "Define local arcane absolute path (override ArcGeoSim default)",
204  (string s) => { opt_arcane_path = normalizePath (s); });
205  m_options.Add ("disable-mpi", "MPI configuration (default is enabled)",
206  v => { mpi_mode = false; });
207  m_options.Add ("v|verbose", "Enable verbose output",
208  v => { GlobalContext.Instance.Verbose = true; });
209  m_options.Add ("h|help|?", "Help page\n\n** Experimental features **",
210  v => { show_help = true; });
211 
212  m_options.Add ("compile:", String.Format("compile after configuration (default command is '{0}')", m_current_compile_command),
213  (string s) => { do_compile = true; if (s != null) m_current_compile_command = s; });
214  m_options.Add ("test:", String.Format("test after configuration and compilation (default command is '{0}')", m_current_test_command),
215  (string s) => { do_compile = do_test = true; if (s != null) m_current_test_command = s; });
216  m_options.Add ("log:", "define log format (no value means default as '%t.log')\n%p is project name; %t is task name (compile, test...); %d is date; %m is mode\n\n** Advanced features **",
217  (string s) => { if (String.IsNullOrEmpty(s)) do_log_format = default_log_format; else do_log_format = s; });
218 
219  m_options.Add ("dry", "Dry mode; do not execute cmake commands and print them",
220  v => { dry_mode = true; });
221  m_options.Add ("meta=", "Enable meta tag (tag will appear lowercase in configuration files)",
222  (string s) => { meta_tags.Add (s); });
223  m_options.Add ("enable=", "Enable package (package name will appear lowercase in configuration files)",
224  (string s) => { packages[s.ToLower()] = true; });
225  m_options.Add ("disable=", "Disable package (package name will appear lowercase in configuration files)\nEnabled/disabled package force configuration ",
226  (string s) => { packages[s.ToLower()] = false; });
227  m_options.Add ("keep-cache", "Do not clean cache",
228  v => { clean_cache = false; });
229  m_options.Add ("clean-cache", "Clean cmake cache (default)",
230  v => { clean_cache = true; });
231  m_options.Add ("clean:", "Clean everything before running configure. Valid values are 'check', 'once' and 'force'\n(default is 'check' which checks if current directory looks like a configured build directory)",
232  (string s) => { opt_clean = (s == null) ? "check" : s; });
233  m_options.Add ("force-regenerate:", "deprecated old clean option name; you have to use --clean",
234  (string s) => { opt_clean = (s == null) ? "check" : s; Console.WriteLine("WARNING: --force-regenerate is deprecated; use --clean instead"); });
235  m_options.Add ("cmake-extra-options=", "Add extra options to CMake\n\n** Internal features **",
236  (string s) => { opt_cmake_extra_options = s; });
237 
238  m_options.Add ("base-command=", "Define user command used to run that configure (required but automatically set by script wrapper)",
239  (string s) => { opt_base_command = s; });
240  m_options.Add ("distrib-path=", "Define project root directory (required if base-command if not set)\nDEPRECATED: will be replaced by --base-command",
241  (string s) => { opt_root_path = normalizePath (s); });
242 
243  m_options.Add ("graphviz=", "Define dot file containing dependencies of cmake target",
244  (string s) => { opt_graphviz = s; });
245 
246  }
247  #endregion
248 
249  #region EXECUTION SEQUENCES
250  public void configure (string[] args)
251  {
252  string[] saved_args = args;
253 
254  try {
255  List<string> remaining_args = m_options.Parse (args);
256 
257  // Check if remaining args looks like options
258  for (int i=0; i<remaining_args.Count; ++i) {
259  String arg = remaining_args [i];
260  if (arg.StartsWith ("-"))
261  throw new Mono.Options.OptionException (String.Format ("Invalid option {0}", arg), arg);
262  else if (arg.Length != 0)
263  throw new Mono.Options.OptionException (String.Format ("Invalid argument {0}", arg), arg);
264  }
265 
266  if (show_help) {
267  showHelpAndExit ();
268  }
269  } catch (Mono.Options.OptionException e) {
270  showHelpAndExit (e.Message);
271  }
272 
273  // Force tower and remove duplicated tags
274  meta_tags = meta_tags.GroupBy (tag => tag.ToLower ()).Select (grp => grp.First ()).ToList ();
275 
276  // vendor mode may be enabled using vendor tag (default or in lowercase).
277  bool vendor_mode = meta_tags.Contains (vendor_tag);
278 
279  if (opt_base_command != null) {
280  if (opt_root_path != null)
281  Console.WriteLine ("WARNING : overriding --distrib-path option using --base-command option");
282  opt_root_path = Path.GetDirectoryName (opt_base_command);
283  }
284  if (opt_root_path == null) {
285  showHelpAndExit ("Undefined required option --distrib-path");
286  }
287 
288  opt_build_path = Environment.CurrentDirectory;
289 
290  if (String.IsNullOrEmpty (Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable ("FC")) && default_fortran_compiler != null) {
291  Environment.SetEnvironmentVariable ("FC", default_fortran_compiler);
292  if (GlobalContext.Instance.Verbose)
293  Console.WriteLine ("Default FC compiler set to '{0}'", default_fortran_compiler);
294  }
295 
296  if (m_common_tools.isWindows ()) { // Windows
297  if (opt_vstudio_name == null) {
298  showHelpAndExit ("Undefined required option --vstudio-name");
299  }
300  }
301 
302  // Check before cmake ?
303  if (opt_arcane_path != null && !Directory.Exists (opt_arcane_path))
304  throw new ConfiguratorException (String.Format ("Cannot access to Arcane directory '{0}'", opt_arcane_path));
305  if (opt_arcgeosim_package_file != null && !File.Exists (opt_arcgeosim_package_file))
306  throw new ConfiguratorException (String.Format ("Cannot access to ArcGeoSim package file '{0}'", opt_arcgeosim_package_file));
307 
308  if(new_build_system) {
309  string vendor_tag = (vendor_mode) ? "+VENDOR" : "";
310  if (opt_arcgeosim_package_file == null)
311  {
312  if (m_common_tools.isWindows())
313  {
314  opt_arcgeosim_package_file = "../common/ArcaneInfra/BuildSystem/configs/IFP-Windows_6.1-AMD64" + vendor_tag + ".cmake";
315  }
316  else
317  {
318  opt_arcgeosim_package_file = "../common/ArcaneInfra/BuildSystem/configs/IFP-Linux-x86_64" + vendor_tag + ".cmake";
319  }
320  }
321  }
322 
323  // Configure default static_mode if not set
324  if (static_mode == null) {
325  if (new_build_system) {
326  if (m_common_tools.isWindows ()) {
327  static_mode = false;
328  } else {
329  static_mode = false;
330  }
331  } else {
332  if (m_common_tools.isWindows ()) {
333  static_mode = true;
334  } else {
335  static_mode = false;
336  }
337  }
338  if (GlobalContext.Instance.Verbose)
339  Console.WriteLine ("{0} library mode enabled as default value", ((bool)static_mode ? "Static" : "Shared"));
340  }
341 
342  // Nettoyage préalable si requis par clean
343  if (opt_clean != null) {
344  if (opt_clean != "check" && opt_clean != "force" && opt_clean != "once")
345  showHelpAndExit (String.Format ("Unknown --clean option '{0}'", opt_clean));
346 
347  DirectoryInfo build_dir = new DirectoryInfo (opt_build_path);
348  if (opt_clean == "check" || opt_clean == "once") {
349  if (!File.Exists ("cmake.configure"))
350  throw new ConfiguratorException ("Cannot destroy directory since it does not look likde a configured directory with 'cmake.configure' file");
351  }
352 
353  Console.WriteLine ("Cleaning build directory");
354  foreach (FileInfo file in build_dir.GetFiles()) {
355  file.Delete ();
356  }
357  foreach (DirectoryInfo directory in build_dir.GetDirectories()) {
358  directory.Delete (true);
359  }
360  }
361 
362  // Ecrit des fichiers pour rejouer la configuration
363  if (opt_base_command != null)
364  writeReplay (opt_base_command, saved_args);
365  else
366  Console.WriteLine ("WARNING: replay files will not created due to missing --base-command option");
367 
368  if (clean_cache) {
369  Console.WriteLine ("Cleaning cache");
370  string cache_filename = "CMakeCache.txt";
371  if (File.Exists (cache_filename))
372  File.Delete (cache_filename);
373  }
374 
375  // Le fichier contenant les infos de packages est passé par variable d'environnement
376  // TODO : pourquoi ?
377  if (opt_arcgeosim_package_file != null) {
378  Environment.SetEnvironmentVariable ("ARCGEOSIM_PACKAGE_FILE", opt_arcgeosim_package_file);
379  }
380 
381  // Configuration cache file
382  string config_file_str = "# WARNING Auto generated configuration file. Do not edit unless you know what you are doing\n";
383  config_file_str += "# configuration data\n";
384  if (new_build_system) {
385  config_file_str += String.Format ("set(CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX \"{0}\" CACHE PATH \"Installation directory\" FORCE)\n", opt_install_prefix);
386  } else {
387  config_file_str += String.Format ("set(CMAKE_CONFIGURATION_TYPES \"{0}\" CACHE TYPE INTERNAL FORCE)\n", releaseMode ()); // restrict allowed configuration to selected mode
388  config_file_str += String.Format ("set(BUILD_SHARED_LIBS \"{0}\" CACHE BOOL \"Link configuration\" FORCE)\n", (bool)static_mode ? "OFF" : "ON");
389  config_file_str += String.Format ("set(ARCGEOSIM_MPI \"{0}\" CACHE PATH \"Enable MPI configuration\" FORCE)\n", mpi_mode ? "TRUE" : "FALSE");
390  config_file_str += String.Format ("set(VERBOSE \"{0}\" CACHE BOOL \"Verbosity\" FORCE)\n", GlobalContext.Instance.Verbose ? "TRUE" : "FALSE");
391  config_file_str += String.Format ("set(CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE \"{0}\" CACHE BOOL \"Build configuration\" FORCE)\n", releaseMode ());
392  config_file_str += String.Format ("set(CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX \"{0}\" CACHE PATH \"Installation directory\" FORCE)\n", opt_install_prefix);
393  config_file_str += String.Format ("set(ARCGEOSIM_ARCANE_VERSION \"{0}\" CACHE PATH \"User Arcane version\" FORCE)\n", opt_arcane);
394  config_file_str += String.Format ("set(ARCGEOSIM_ARCANE_PATH \"{0}\" CACHE PATH \"User Arcane path\" FORCE)\n", opt_arcane_path);
395  config_file_str += String.Format ("set(ARCGEOSIM_PACKAGE_FILE \"{0}\" CACHE PATH \"User package file\" FORCE)\n", opt_arcgeosim_package_file);
396  /* Not used since environment variable seems to be ok with Windows
397  * foreach (string compiler_env in compiler_envs)
398  {
399  string s = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable(compiler_env);
400  if (!String.IsNullOrEmpty(s))
401  {
402  config_file_str += String.Format ("set({0} \"{1}\")\n",compiler_env,s);
403  }
404  }
405  */
406  foreach (string tag in meta_tags) {
407  string cmake_tag = convertTagToCMake (tag);
408  config_file_str += String.Format ("set({0}_FOUND \"TRUE\" CACHE BOOL \"{1} tag enabled\" FORCE)\n", cmake_tag, tag);
409  config_file_str += String.Format ("set({0}_NAME \"{1}\" CACHE STRING \"{1} Mode enabled\" FORCE)\n", cmake_tag, tag);
410  }
411 
412  foreach (KeyValuePair<string,bool> kvp in packages) {
413  string tag = kvp.Key;
414  string cmake_tag = convertTagToCMake (tag);
415  config_file_str += String.Format ("set({0}_DISABLED \"{2}\" CACHE BOOL \"{1} package disabled\" FORCE)\n", cmake_tag, tag, (!kvp.Value) ? "TRUE" : "FALSE");
416  }
417 
418  config_file_str += String.Format ("set(REQUIRED_DEPENDENCIES \"{0}\" CACHE LIST \"Initial required dependencies\")\n",
419  String.Join (";", meta_tags.ConvertAll (x => convertTagToCMake (x)).ToArray ()));
420 
421  if (m_common_tools.isWindows ()) { // Windows
422  config_file_str += String.Format ("set(WIN32_PATCH_FILE \"patch_windows_for_vcproj.bat\" CACHE PATH \"User package file\" FORCE)\n");
423  config_file_str += String.Format ("set(VISUAL_STUDIO_NAME \"{0}\" CACHE PATH \"Visual studio name\" FORCE)\n", opt_vstudio_name);
424  }
425  }
426  config_file_str += "# end of configuration data\n";
427  System.IO.File.WriteAllText ("cmake.configure", config_file_str);
428 
429  string cmake_args = "";
430  cmake_args += " -Wno-dev";
431  if (m_common_tools.isWindows ()) { // Windows
432  cmake_args += " -G \"" + opt_vstudio_name + "\"";
433  if (opt_toolset_name != null)
434  cmake_args += " -T \"" + opt_toolset_name + "\"";
435  } else {
436  // cmake_args += " -DCMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS=ON";
437  if (sublime_generator && eclipse_generator) {
438  showHelpAndExit ("Both options --sublime and --eclipse enabled");
439  }
440  if (sublime_generator) {
441  cmake_args += " -G \"Sublime Text 2 - Unix Makefiles\"";
442  }
443  if (eclipse_generator) {
444  cmake_args += " -G \"Eclipse CDT4 - Unix Makefiles\"";
445  }
446  if (ninja_generator) {
447  cmake_args += " -G \"Ninja\"";
448  }
449  }
450 
451  if (opt_graphviz != null) {
452  cmake_args += " --graphviz=" + opt_graphviz;
453  }
454 
455  if (new_build_system) {
456 
457  cmake_args += " -DNewBuildSystem=ON";
458 
459  if (GlobalContext.Instance.Verbose)
460  cmake_args += " -DVerbose=ON";
461 
462  cmake_args += " -DDebug=" + (release_mode?"OFF":"ON");
463  cmake_args += " -DShared=" + ((bool)static_mode?"OFF":"ON");
464 
465  if (meta_tags.Count > 0)
466  cmake_args += " -DEnableMetas=\"" + String.Join(";",meta_tags.ToArray()) + "\"";
467  IEnumerable<String> enabled_packages = packages.Where( v => v.Value == true).Select(v => v.Key);
468  if (enabled_packages.Count() > 0)
469  cmake_args += " -DEnablePackages=" + String.Join(";",enabled_packages.ToArray());
470  IEnumerable<String> disabled_packages = packages.Where( v => v.Value == false).Select(v => v.Key);
471  if (disabled_packages.Count() > 0)
472  cmake_args += " -DDisablePackages=" + String.Join(";",disabled_packages.ToArray());
473 
474  if(opt_arcane != null)
475  cmake_args += " -DArcaneVersion=" + opt_arcane;
476  if(opt_arcane_path != null)
477  cmake_args += " -DArcanePath=" + opt_arcane_path;
478  if(opt_arcgeosim_package_file != null)
479  cmake_args += " -DPackageFile=" + opt_arcgeosim_package_file;
480  }
481  cmake_args += " -Ccmake.configure";
482 
483  if (opt_cmake_extra_options != null)
484  cmake_args += " " + opt_cmake_extra_options;
485  cmake_args += " -- " + opt_root_path;
486  //TODO proteger les arguments qui contiennent des espaces
487  int r = ExecProcess ("cmake", cmake_args);
488  if (r != 0) {
489  throw new ConfiguratorException ("cmake command has failed");
490  }
491 
492  if (m_common_tools.isWindows ()) { // Windows
493  if (!new_build_system && (bool)static_mode) {
494  Console.WriteLine ("Parsing vcproj file");
495  r = ExecProcess ("patch_windows_for_vcproj.bat", null);
496  if (r != 0) {
497  throw new ConfiguratorException ("patch_windows_for_vcproj has failed");
498  }
499  }
500 
501  Console.WriteLine ("Executing post cmake commands");
502 
503  if (new_build_system) {
504  Console.WriteLine ("** TODO ** Needs to rebuild bin directory **");
505  } else {
506  string pkg_path = Path.Combine (opt_build_path, "pkglist.xml");
507  PkglistParser pkg_parser = new PkglistParser ();
508  pkg_parser.Parse (pkg_path);
509  string sys_copy_path = Path.Combine (opt_build_path, "bin");
510  Console.WriteLine ("Rebuild bin directory '{0}'", sys_copy_path);
511  //if (Directory.Exists(sys_copy_path)) {
512  // // Supprime les dll du repertoire de destination
513  // foreach (string f in Directory.GetFiles(sys_copy_path, "*.dll")) {
514  // if (GlobalContext.Instance.Verbose)
515  // Console.WriteLine("Removing dll '{0}'", f);
516  // File.Delete(f);
517  // }
518  //}
519  Directory.CreateDirectory (sys_copy_path);
520  foreach (string dir in pkg_parser.Directories) {
521  if (!Directory.Exists (dir)) {
522  if (GlobalContext.Instance.Verbose)
523  Console.WriteLine ("Skip non-existing directory '{0}'", dir);
524  continue;
525  } else {
526  if (GlobalContext.Instance.Verbose)
527  Console.WriteLine ("Copy DLLs from directory '{0}'", dir);
528  }
529  string[] files = Directory.GetFiles (dir, "*.dll");
530  foreach (string f in files) {
531  string copy_path = Path.Combine (sys_copy_path, Path.GetFileName (f));
532  if (GlobalContext.Instance.Verbose)
533  Console.WriteLine ("\tCopy '{0}' to '{1}'", f, copy_path);
534  File.Copy (f, copy_path, true);
535  }
536  }
537  }
538  }
539 
540  // Since CMake is done, we can get project name from CMakeCache.txt
541  setProjectName ();
542 
543  if (do_compile) {
544  string log_file = parseFormat(do_log_format,"compile");
545  string command = parseFormat(m_current_compile_command,"compile");
546  doThis (command, log_file, "Compiling");
547  }
548 
549  if (do_test) {
550  string log_file = parseFormat (do_log_format, "test");
551  string command = parseFormat(m_current_test_command,"test");
552  doThis (command, log_file, "Testing");
553  }
554 
555  if (vendor_mode && !new_build_system) {
556  if (release_mode == false)
557  Console.WriteLine ("WARNING: Vendor configuration without --release option");
558  VendorChecker vendorChecker = new VendorChecker ();
559  string pkg_path = Path.Combine (opt_build_path, "pkglist.xml");
560  // TODO: regarder aussi le pkglist.xml de arcane
561  vendorChecker.Check (pkg_path);
562  }
563  }
564  #endregion
565 
566  private void showHelpAndExit (String message = null)
567  {
568  StringWriter writer = new StringWriter ();
569  if (message == null)
570  writer.WriteLine ("Requested Help page");
571  else
572  writer.WriteLine (message);
573 
574  writer.WriteLine ("Usage: {0} [options]", codename);
575  writer.WriteLine ("Options : ");
576  m_options.WriteOptionDescriptions (writer);
577  writer.WriteLine ("\nNOTA: --base-command, --clean=once, --force-regenerate=once options are not replicated in replay configuration scripts");
578  if (default_fortran_compiler != null)
579  writer.WriteLine (" : Default Fortran compiler is '{0}'", default_fortran_compiler);
580  writer.WriteLine (" : Configure catch following environment variables : {0}", String.Join (" ", external_envs));
581 
582  if (message == null)
583  throw new ConfiguratorExit (writer.ToString ());
584  else
585  throw new ConfiguratorException (writer.ToString ());
586  }
587 
588  int ExecProcess (string cmd, string args)
589  {
590  if (GlobalContext.Instance.Verbose)
591  Console.WriteLine ("Launching process cmd={0} args={1}", cmd, args);
592 
593  if (dry_mode) {
594  Console.WriteLine ("> {0} {1}", cmd, args);
595  return 0;
596  }
597 
598  int r = 0;
599  using (Process p = new Process()) {
600  p.StartInfo.UseShellExecute = false;
601  p.StartInfo.FileName = cmd;
602  p.StartInfo.Arguments = args;
603  try {
604  p.Start ();
605  p.WaitForExit ();
606  r = p.ExitCode;
607  if (GlobalContext.Instance.Verbose)
608  Console.WriteLine ("Process {0} exit code={1}", cmd, r);
609  } catch (Win32Exception e) {
610  Console.Error.WriteLine ("Error '{0}' has been occurred while executing command:\n\t{1} {2}", e.Message, cmd, args);
611  r = -1;
612  }
613  }
614  return r;
615  }
616 
617  private void writeReplay (string this_command, string[] args)
618  {
619  Regex ValueOption = new Regex (@"^(?<flag>--|-|/)(?<name>[^:=]+)((?<sep>[:=])(?<value>.*))?$"); // Identique à Mono_Options.cs
620 
621  StringBuilder cmd = new StringBuilder();
622  cmd.AppendFormat("{0}", this_command);
623  List<string> arg_list = new List<string> (args);
624  foreach (string loop_arg in arg_list.Distinct()) {
625  string arg = loop_arg;
626  Match m = ValueOption.Match (arg);
627  if (m.Success) {
628  string flag = m.Groups ["flag"].Value;
629  string name = m.Groups ["name"].Value;
630  if (name == "base-command")
631  continue; // skip --base-command option
632  if (m.Groups ["sep"].Success && m.Groups ["value"].Success) {
633  string sep = m.Groups ["sep"].Value;
634  string value = m.Groups ["value"].Value;
635  if (name == "force-regenerate" && value == "once")
636  continue; // skip --force-regenerate=once
637  if (name == "clean" && value == "once")
638  continue; // skip --clean=once
639  arg = flag + name + sep + '"' + value + '"';
640  } else {
641  arg = flag + name;
642  }
643  } else {
644  arg = '"' + arg + "'";
645  }
646  cmd.AppendFormat (" {0}", arg);
647  }
648 
649  string force_regenerate_script_option = " --clean=once";
650  if (opt_clean != null && opt_clean != "once") {
651  force_regenerate_script_option = null;
652  }
653 
654  if (m_common_tools.isWindows ()) { // Windows
655  // More infos in special variables: http://www.microsoft.com/resources/documentation/windows/xp/all/proddocs/en-us/percent.mspx?mfr=true
656  cmd.Append (" %*"); // add extra args
657  List<string> envs = new List<string>();
658  foreach (string comp in external_envs)
659  {
660  string comp_cmd = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable(comp);
661  if (!String.IsNullOrEmpty(comp_cmd))
662  envs.Add(String.Format("set {0}={1}", comp, comp_cmd));
663  }
664  {
665  string path = "reconfigure.bat";
666  using (TextWriter writer = new StreamWriter(path)) {
667  writer.WriteLine ("@echo off");
668  foreach (string s in envs)
669  writer.WriteLine("echo \"Environment: {0}\"", s);
670  writer.WriteLine("echo \"Execute: {0}\"",cmd.ToString());
671  foreach (string s in envs)
672  writer.WriteLine(s);
673  writer.WriteLine(cmd.ToString());
674  }
675  }
676 
677  {
678  string path = "force-regenerate.bat";
679  using (TextWriter writer = new StreamWriter(path)) {
680  writer.WriteLine ("@echo off");
681  foreach (string s in envs)
682  writer.WriteLine("echo \"Environment: {0}\"", s);
683  writer.WriteLine("echo \"Destroy all and execute: {0}\"{1}", cmd.ToString(), force_regenerate_script_option);
684  foreach (string s in envs)
685  writer.WriteLine(s);
686  writer.WriteLine("{0}{1}", cmd.ToString(), force_regenerate_script_option);
687  }
688  }
689  } else { // Linux
690  cmd.Append (" $@"); // add extra args
691  string env = "";
692  foreach (string comp in external_envs)
693  {
694  string comp_cmd = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable(comp);
695  if (!String.IsNullOrEmpty(comp_cmd))
696  env += String.Format("{0}={1} ", comp, comp_cmd);
697  }
698  {
699  string path = "reconfigure";
700  using (TextWriter writer = new StreamWriter(path)) {
701  writer.WriteLine ("#!/bin/sh");
702  writer.WriteLine ("echo 'Execute: {0}{1}'", env, cmd.ToString ());
703  writer.WriteLine ("{0}{1}", env, cmd.ToString ());
704  }
705  if (ExecProcess ("/bin/chmod", String.Format ("+x {0}", path)) != 0) {
706  throw new Exception (String.Format ("Cannot update permissions for file {0}", path));
707  }
708  }
709 
710  {
711  string path = "force-regenerate";
712  using (TextWriter writer = new StreamWriter(path)) {
713  writer.WriteLine ("#!/bin/sh");
714  writer.WriteLine ("echo 'Destroy all and execute: {0}{1}{2}'", env, cmd.ToString (), force_regenerate_script_option);
715  writer.WriteLine ("{0}{1}{2}", env, cmd.ToString (),force_regenerate_script_option);
716  }
717  if (ExecProcess ("/bin/chmod", String.Format ("+x {0}", path)) != 0) {
718  throw new Exception (String.Format ("Cannot update permissions for file {0}", path));
719  }
720  }
721  }
722  }
723 
724  private static string convertTagToCMake (string tag)
725  {
726  string tmp = tag.ToUpper();
727  tmp = tmp.Replace ('-', '_');
728  tmp = tmp.Replace ('+', 'X');
729  return tmp;
730  }
731 
732  private string normalizePath (string s)
733  {
734  if (m_common_tools.isWindows ()) {
735  s = s.Replace ("\\", "/");
736  }
737  // s = s.Replace (" ", "\\ ");
738  return s;
739 
740  }
741 
742  private void setProjectName()
743  {
744  string filePath = "CMakeCache.txt";
745  Regex regex = new Regex (@"^CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME:STATIC=(?<name>.*)?$");
746  using (var f = File.OpenRead(filePath))
747  {
748  var s = new StreamReader(f);
749  while (!s.EndOfStream)
750  {
751  string line = s.ReadLine();
752  Match m = regex.Match (line);
753  if (m.Success) {
754  f.Close ();
755  m_project_name = m.Groups ["name"].Value;
756  return;
757  }
758  }
759  f.Close();
760  }
761  throw new ConfiguratorException ("Cannot identify project name");
762  }
763 
764  private string parseFormat(string format, string task)
765  {
766  if (String.IsNullOrEmpty (format))
767  return null;
768 
769  string release_mode = releaseMode ();
770  if (!m_common_tools.isWindows ())
771  release_mode = release_mode.ToLower ();
772 
773  return format
774  .Replace ("%p", m_project_name)
775  .Replace ("%t", task)
776  .Replace ("%d", m_date_time.ToString("s"))
777  .Replace ("%m", release_mode);
778  }
779 
780  private string releaseMode() {
781  if (release_mode)
782  return "Release";
783  else
784  return "Debug";
785  }
786 
787  void doThis(string command, string log_file, string what)
788  {
789  if (String.IsNullOrEmpty(command)) {
790  Console.WriteLine ("Skip {0} due to null command", what.ToLower ());
791  return;
792  }
793 
794  TextWriter saved_cout = Console.Out;
795 
796  int split_position = command.IndexOf (" ");
797  string command_base, command_args;
798  if (split_position <= 0) {
799  command_base = command;
800  command_args = "";
801  } else {
802  command_base = command.Substring(0,split_position);
803  command_args = command.Substring(split_position+1);
804  }
805 
806  int r = 0;
807  using (Process p = new Process()) {
808 
809  p.StartInfo.UseShellExecute = false;
810  p.StartInfo.FileName = command_base;
811  p.StartInfo.Arguments = command_args;
812 
813  if (dry_mode || GlobalContext.Instance.Verbose)
814  Console.WriteLine("Execute: {0} {1}", p.StartInfo.FileName, p.StartInfo.Arguments);
815 
816  if (log_file != null)
817  {
818  // bool overwritten = File.Exists(log_file);
819  Console.WriteLine ("{2} project {0} with logs in {1}", m_project_name, log_file, what);
820  StreamWriter sw = new StreamWriter(log_file);
821  sw.AutoFlush = true;
822  Console.SetOut (new MirroringTextWriter(Console.Out, sw));
823  p.StartInfo.RedirectStandardOutput = true;
824  p.StartInfo.RedirectStandardError = true;
825  p.OutputDataReceived += (sender, out_args) => {
826  if (out_args.Data != null) {
827  Console.WriteLine(out_args.Data);
828  } };
829  p.ErrorDataReceived += (sender, out_args) => {
830  if (out_args.Data != null) {
831  Console.WriteLine(out_args.Data);
832  } };
833  } else {
834  Console.WriteLine ("{1} project {0} (without logging)", m_project_name, what);
835  }
836 
837  try {
838  if (!dry_mode) {
839  p.Start ();
840  if (log_file != null)
841  {
842  p.BeginOutputReadLine ();
843  p.BeginErrorReadLine ();
844  }
845  p.WaitForExit ();
846  r = p.ExitCode;
847  }
848  }
849  catch (Exception e) {
850  throw new ConfiguratorException(String.Format ("Error '{0}' has been occurred while {3}:\n\t{1} {2}", e.Message, p.StartInfo.FileName, p.StartInfo.Arguments, what.ToLower()));
851  }
852  }
853 
854  // Restore Console out
855  if (log_file != null) {
856  Console.SetOut(saved_cout);
857  }
858  }
859  }
860 
861 
862  public sealed class GlobalContext
863  {
864  private static readonly GlobalContext _instance = new GlobalContext ();
865 
866  private GlobalContext ()
867  {
868  }
869 
870  public static GlobalContext Instance {
871  get {
872  return _instance;
873  }
874  }
875 
876  private bool verbose = false;
877 
878  public bool Verbose {
879  get { return verbose; }
880  set { verbose = value; }
881  }
882  }
883 }
884
